title: Excalibur - Galosphere Silver Ores
description: Changes Galosphere's silver ore to match Excalibur's stone and deepslate texture.
body:
A small and simple retexture of [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)'s silver ore to match [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)'s stone and deepslate block textures.


![Example image comparing the before and after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2179c957f9022c5e01f4052b4ef2af9bc738ff39_0.webp)
